case_title: THOMPSON, DEANNA VS R & R FRENCH BROS. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY THOMPSON, DEANNA AS TO DEFENDANT R & R FRENCH BROS. LAUREN LEATHER, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMPSON, DEANNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT R & R FRENCH BROS. LAUREN LEATHER, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,085.00, JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT, LAUREN LEATHER, INC. PLAINTIFF TO RETURN THE COUCH TO R & R FRENCH BROS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
